column3: LRU eviction for responseCache prevents unbounded growth and improves prune efficiency
column6: Replaced raw Map with LruCache class (max 500 entries); LRU evicts on insert when cap exceeded; TTL-aware with bounded prune scan

column3: Semantic-match endpoint telemetry tracks hit rate, latency, and term match counts
